title: Odysseus + Gemma-4 26B & FREE APIs: RIP Hermes & OpenClaw! THIS IS CRAZY!
summary: Odysseus is a local-first AI workspace that enables self-hosting and interaction with local models like Gemma. It includes AI agents with web search and shell access, a model cookbook for hardware-aware recommendations, deep research capabilities, blind model comparison, and integrated productivity features like notes, memory, calendar, and email.
